seo.title: Lawn Care Review Management Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your lawn or landscaping business. Route upset customers to private feedback first. Free forever, no credit card required.

h1: Review Management for Lawn Care and Landscaping

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Lawn Care and Landscaping
hero.subheading: Crews finish a property and roll to the next job. ReviewFlo sends the ask before homeowners move on with their weekend.

socialProof.text: Built for lawn and landscape companies

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every Lawn Care Business Faces

items.heading: A tidy yard looks “just expected”
items.body: Good work blends in. Nobody thinks to praise mowing online.

items.heading: Weather and seasonality make reviews spike or stall
items.body: Busy stretches mean zero follow-up. Slow weeks feel scary on cash flow.

items.heading: One missed edge becomes a neighborhood warning
items.body: Local groups amplify small complaints fast.

howItWorks.sectionHeading: How ReviewFlo Works for Lawn Care Companies

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after the visit
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link right after the appointment or job.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they send feedback to you privately.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star clients go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

benefits.sectionHeading: Why Lawn Care Companies Choose ReviewFlo

items.heading: Text after the crew leaves
items.body: Catch homeowners while they still see the stripes.

items.heading: Private line for damage or billing disputes
items.body: Solve sprinkler hits or invoice issues before they star you down.

items.heading: Routes full of stops, inbox still simple
items.body: Owners send in batches if that fits the day.

items.heading: $270/month cheaper than Podium
items.body: Podium is $289/month. ReviewFlo Pro is $19/month, and there’s a free plan.

items.a: Yes, right after a visit that made the yard obviously better.

items.q: What about HOA or city complaints?
items.a: Private feedback helps you hear the story before it escalates publicly.

items.q: How is this different from Podium?
items.a: Same review routing without a price built for national franchises.
Use the same flow per job contact.
Start with one company link and split later if needed.

finalCta.heading: Start Getting More Lawn Care Reviews Today
finalCta.subheading: Free forever. No credit card. Your first review request goes out in under 5 minutes.
